nasb.text: He spoke of trees, from the cedar that is in Lebanon even to the hyssop that grows on the wall; he spoke also of animals and birds and creeping things and fish.

esv.text: He spoke of trees, from the cedar that is in Lebanon to the hyssop that grows out of the wall. He spoke also of beasts, and of birds, and of reptiles, and of fish.

cnv.text: 他講論草木，從黎巴嫩的香柏木到生長在牆上的牛膝草；他也講論走獸、飛禽、爬行的動物和魚類。

ccb.text: 他对飞禽走兽、草木鱼虫，从黎巴嫩的香柏树到长在墙上的牛膝草，都无所不知。
